offer_about: NH Bentota Ceysands Resort - 50% off on Double & Triple rooms on Full Board and Half Board basis for Union Bank Credit Cards. Booking period 11-13 June 2026; stay period 12 June - 31 August 2026. Limited to 2 rooms per cardholder, first-come first-served; full upfront payment at booking; extras/supplements excluded; standard hotel cancellation policies apply; cannot be combined with other offers. Reservations 034 227 5073.

Glomark - Softlogic Supermarkets - 25% off on bills above Rs.5,000 (max discount Rs.2,500 per card per day) for all Union Bank Credit Cards. Valid 7-22 June 2026. One transaction per day per card; applies to all outlets including Essentials and www.glomark.lk; max 5 units/5kg per item per bill/day; excludes milk foods, eggs, milk powder, OTC products, malt/infant foods, hot foods, whole chicken, sugar, flour, rice, pulses, coconuts, liquor, tobacco, gift vouchers, electronics, hampers, pharmaceuticals and furniture; non-commercial only.

Keells - 25% off on fresh Vegetables, Fruits, Seafood & Meat for Union Bank Credit Cards. Valid every Friday until 26 June 2026. Minimum bill Rs.4,000; max discount Rs.1,500 per bill per day; max 3kg/unit per item; excludes packeted/processed items, packeted chicken and roast chicken; full payment via Union Bank Credit Card; not for commercial purchases; cannot be combined with other offers.

Cargills Food City - 10% off on total bills above Rs.8,000 (max discount Rs.1,000 per bill per day) for Union Bank Credit Cards. Valid 9-24 June 2026 (Mondays). Excludes packeted/bulk rice, liquor, tobacco, utility payments and gift vouchers; max 5 units/kg per product per bill per day; full payment via Union Bank Credit Card; cannot be combined with other promotions.

Laugfs Supermarkets - 10% off on total bill above Rs.5,000 (max discount Rs.1,500 per card daily) for all Union Bank Credit Cardholders. Valid every Saturday until 27 June 2026. Max 3kg/units each from milk powder, rice, sugar, dhal & flour per bill per day; excludes liquor, tobacco, pharmaceuticals, discounted items, gift vouchers, hampers, gas and utility payments; full payment via Union Bank Credit Card; cannot be combined with other offers.

Keells - Crispy Chicken Bucket - 50% off (Rs.3,160 down to Rs.1,580) for all Union Bank Credit Cards. Valid 17 June 2026 only. Max 2 items per cardholder; payment via Union Bank Credit Card; non-transferable, not exchangeable for cash; cannot be combined with other promotions; not for commercial purchases.

Radisson Hotel Colombo - Dine Restaurant - Father's Day 30% off on dine-in Dinner Buffet and High Tea (max discount Rs.12,000 per card per day) for all UB Credit Cards. Valid 21 June 2026. Full bill settled via Union Bank Credit Card; gift vouchers excluded; cannot be combined with other promotions; excess discount reversed on next statement; not for commercial use.

Firebeach - 30% off on dine-in for food (max discount Rs.10,000 per card per day) for all Union Bank Credit Cards. Valid until 30 June 2026. Food only, gift vouchers excluded; not applicable for special events; full bill payment via Union Bank Credit Card; cannot be combined with other promotions. Reservations 0117541010.

Fuel Cashback - 5% cashback on eligible fuel transactions made on Sundays & Mondays (max Rs.625 per cardholder weekly) for Union Bank Credit Cards. Valid until 29 June 2026. Minimum transaction Rs.2,500; cashback calculated on cumulative eligible weekly spend; transactions outside eligible days do not qualify; cannot be combined with other promotions; not for commercial purchases.

UB 24 - convert any purchase into 0% interest up to 24-month instalment plans on transactions above Rs.50,000 for UB Platinum & Signature Credit Cards. Available tenors 3/6/12/18/24 months; one-time processing fee Rs.990-5,400 by tenor/amount; excludes cash advances, fuel and mobile/virtual wallet top-ups; convert within 14 days via 011 7818181; early settlement 4% fee; max daily conversion Platinum Rs.500,000 / Signature Rs.2,000,000. Promotion period ends 24 June 2026.

0% - Solar - up to 12 months interest-free instalments on transactions above Rs.50,000 for all Union Bank Credit Cards; up to 24 months for Platinum & Signature cards on purchases above Rs.500,000. Processing fees Rs.1,900-2,400 (12 months) / Rs.5,400 (24 months). Valid 29 May - 30 June 2026. Convert within 14 days; combined plans cannot exceed 80% of credit limit; early settlement 4% fee; excludes gift vouchers, discounted items, cash advances and commercial transactions.

0% - Travel & Leisure - up to 12 months interest-free instalments on transactions above Rs.50,000 for all Union Bank Credit Cards; up to 24 months for Platinum & Signature cards on transactions above Rs.100,000. Processing fees Rs.1,900-2,400 (12 months) / Rs.3,900-5,400 (24 months). Valid until 30 June 2026. Convert within 14 days; combined plans cannot exceed 80% of credit limit; early settlement 4% fee; excludes gift vouchers, discounted items and selected branded purchases.

0% - Gadgets & Home Appliances - up to 12 months 0% instalment plans on all cards for transactions above Rs.50,000 for Union Bank Credit Cards. Processing fee Rs.1,900 (below Rs.100,000) / Rs.2,400 (above Rs.100,000). Valid until 30 June 2026. Convert within 14 days; total plans cannot exceed 80% of credit limit; early settlement 4% fee; excludes gift vouchers, discounted items and select branded purchases.

UB 12 - 'Anything Anywhere' 0% interest up to 12-month instalment plans on transactions above Rs.50,000 for Union Bank Credit Cards. Convert within 14 days via 011 7818181; early settlement 4% fee; excludes cash advances, fuel and wallet top-ups. Promotion period ends 12 June 2026.
